@START
@author: project system development
@id: easy
@shuffle_questions: true
@feedback_mode: end
---
What is 2 + 2?
[] 3
[x] 4
[] 5
---
Which of the following countries are officially located on the continent of South America?
[] Costa Rica
[x] Bolivia
[] Mexico
[x] Uruguay
[x] Suriname
---
The octopus has {{3|1|4|8}} hearts
